title: Spicy Fluffy Moroccan Apricot Stir-fry
description: A comforting dish featuring fluffy apricots mixed with a spicy, aromatic blend in an air fryer for a sugar-free and easy meal.
instructions: In a bowl, combine apricots with minced garlic, cumin seeds, turmeric powder, and red pepper flakes. Mix well.
Drizzle soy sauce over the mixture to coat evenly and add water gradually until the desired consistency is reached.
Heat oil in an air fryer basket at 375°F (190°C). Spoon the apricot mixture into the hot oil and cook for about 8-10 minutes, flipping occasionally until lightly browned on all sides.
Reduce heat to medium and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning. Serve warm.
